headline: Property & Casualty Insurance Stocks Q4 In Review: Travelers (NYSE:TRV) Vs Peers
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how property & casualty insurance stocks fared in Q4, starting with Travelers (NYSE:TRV).
